overall_rating: Good - Ready for use with minor fixes

documentation.notes: Clear and comprehensive, but has inconsistencies between SKILL.md and README.md, and dual-script confusion

installation.notes: Works but has rough edges. Missing install script, placeholder GitHub URL, vague PATH configuration

security.notes: Good practices with env vars and credential manager support. Could add audit logging and key rotation guidance

error_handling.notes: Basic error checking present. Missing rate limit handling, retry logic, debug mode

integration.notes: JSON mode and Warden integration work well for OpenClaw. Could add more agent workflow examples

completeness.notes: Core features present. Contact commands exist but not in both script versions. Missing bulk operations

critical_issues.title: Placeholder GitHub URL in installation docs

high_priority_issues.title: Contact commands missing from scripts/ version
Environment variables not documented in metadata

immediate: Consolidate duplicate scripts into single canonical version
Fix installation documentation with real GitHub URL
Enhance .clawhub/skill.json with bin, scripts, description fields
Add auth-test command for API key validation
short_term: Add comprehensive error handling (rate limits, retries, timeouts)
Document environment variables in SKILL.md metadata

verdict.recommendation: Fix P0 issues before ClawHub publishing. Skill has strong foundation but dual-script confusion and installation docs are critical blockers.

strengths: Contact/reverse alias functionality for email workflows
Bash-based, easy to integrate with other skills
weaknesses: Two different script versions with different features
Missing error handling for rate limits and network failures

missing_openclaw_features: Environment variable metadata in skill definition
